productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Red Check Shirt
description: Composition Red and black checked shirt made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves and double buttoned cuffs, spread black collar with white stitch detailing, front buttoned placket, outline of a cut-out pocket on the left chest and white stitch detailing on the curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Get casual and comfortable in style with this red and black checked shirt from united colors of benetton. The white stitch detailing and the cut-out pocket gives this shirt a stylish look, while you can roll up the sleeves to suit the occasion. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size XL on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
